nativeSnippet: export const toPlain = <A>(value: A): unknown => JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
note: Generic deep-plain conversion: stringify then parse to strip non-plain values into `unknown`. No target schema for the generic <A> input. Round-trips through both JSON.stringify and JSON.parse; model a schema later or replace with a schema-based plain-conversion codec. Result feeds toSnapshot -> S.decodeUnknownSync(UnknownRecord).
